summary: Access Control & Visibility System testing completed. Backend APIs all working correctly. Frontend pages fixed and now displaying data properly. Fixed duplicate MapPin import in Layout.jsx, fixed double /api/ prefix in API calls, and fixed trailing slash issues causing 307 redirects with mixed content errors.

minor.issue: Returns 307 redirect without trailing slash, causing mixed content error when redirected to http://
Returns 307 redirect without trailing slash, causing mixed content error when redirected to http://

integration_issues.issue: Mixed content warning for /api/notifications/ - non-blocking but shows in console

backend_api_tests.geography_list_countries: PASS - Returns 6 countries (CM, CF, TD, GQ, GA, NG)
backend_api_tests.pods_get_details: PASS - Returns pod with members and operators
backend_api_tests.employee_scopes_create: PASS - Can create custom scope with filters
backend_api_tests.customer_location_ip_info: PASS - Returns IP and location info

frontend_tests.employee_scopes_page: PASS - Displays 7 scopes with proper categorization

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed duplicate MapPin import in Layout.jsx causing frontend crash
Fixed double /api/ prefix in GeographyManagement.jsx, PodManagement.jsx, EmployeeScopeManagement.jsx - API client already has /api as baseURL
Fixed trailing slash issue in PodManagement.jsx and EmployeeScopeManagement.jsx - /users and /operators endpoints need trailing slash to avoid 307 redirect
Changed fallback URL in api/client.js from http:// to https:// to prevent mixed content errors
seed_data_creation: Backend has 6 countries, 10 Cameroon regions, 1 pod (Alpha Team), 7 default employee scopes initialized
context_for_next_testing_agent: Access Control system is fully functional. Geography API has 6 countries and 10 Cameroon regions. Pods API has 1 pod (Alpha Team). Employee Scopes API has 7 default scopes. Frontend pages at /admin/geography, /admin/pods, /admin/employee-scopes are all working. Note: API endpoints /users and /operators require trailing slash to avoid 307 redirect issues.
